fn_def_list.fn_code:
static void
wr_cs (void)
{
  /* It seems that the CS struct is not normal - the size is wrong
     heres one I prepared earlier.  */
  static char b[] =
    {
    0x80,			/* IT */
    0x21,			/* RL */
    0x00,			/* number of chars in variable length part */
    0x80,			/* hd */
    0x00,			/* hs */
    0x80,			/* un */
    0x00,			/* us */
    0x80,			/* sc */
    0x00,			/* ss */
    0x80,			/* er */
    0x80,			/* ed */
    0x80,			/* sh */
    0x80,			/* ob */
    0x80,			/* rl */
    0x80,			/* du */
    0x80,			/* dps */
    0x80,			/* dsy */
    0x80,			/* dty */
    0x80,			/* dln */
    0x80,			/* dso */
    0x80,			/* dus */
    0x00,			/* dss */
    0x80,			/* dbt */
    0x00,			/* dpp */
    0x80,			/* dfp */
    0x80,			/* den */
    0x80,			/* dds */
    0x80,			/* dar */
    0x80,			/* dpt */
    0x00,			/* dul */
    0x00,			/* dse */
    0x00,			/* dot */
    0xDE			/* CS */
  };

  if (fwrite (b, sizeof (b), 1, file) != 1)
    /* FIXME: Return error status.  */
    fatal (_("Failed to write CS struct"));
}
